description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests (GPU) that runs every Sunday at 7AM UTC and allows manual dispatch. The workflow consists of three jobs: build-gem5, LULESH-tests, and HACC-tests, all running on self-hosted Linux x64 environments with specific containers. The build-gem5 job builds gem5, uploads the artifact, and prints the job status. The LULESH-tests and HACC-tests jobs download the gem5 build, perform tests, and run benchmarks.
